hero.title: Advanced Peptide Solutions for Research and Industry
hero.subtitle: High-purity peptides manufactured under strict quality standards for pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and research applications worldwide.

highPurity.title: High Purity
highPurity.description: Multi-stage HPLC purification achieving 98%+ purity levels with rigorous mass spectrometry verification.

customSynthesis.title: Custom Synthesis
customSynthesis.description: Tailored peptide sequences from 5 to 100+ amino acids with modifications including stapled peptides and cyclic structures.

globalCompliance.title: Global Compliance
globalCompliance.description: FDA-registered facility meeting GMP, ISO 9001, and ICH Q7 guidelines for pharmaceutical intermediates.
